name: uiauditor
description: Read-only UI-implementation audit skill: audits how a codebase builds its user interface across 8 always-on dimensions (accessibility, semantic HTML, styling architecture, component and UI state, responsive layout, frontend performance, design-system consistency, assets and media) plus 2 conditional ones (internationalization readiness, native/cross-platform UI), writes a scored, prioritized uiaudit.md, and reports the verdict in chat. Works in both Claude Code (/uiauditor) and Codex ($uiauditor).
